languages.text: "Что это, Себериан? Я слышу страх в твоем голосе?"
"What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
languages.original_text: "Что это, Себериан? Я слышу страх в твоем голосе?"

traits.locale_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
"What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
"What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
"What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
"What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

languages.text: “怎么回事，塞贝里安？我居然从你的声音里听到了恐惧？”
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: “怎么回事，塞贝里安？我居然从你的声音里听到了恐惧？”

languages.text: «¿Qué pasa, Seberian? ¿Es miedo lo que noto en su voz?».
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué pasa, Seberian? ¿Es miedo lo que noto en su voz?».

languages.text: « Comment, Seberian ? Est-ce de la peur que j'entends dans votre voix ? »
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: « Comment, Seberian ? Est-ce de la peur que j'entends dans votre voix ? »

languages.text: "Bu da ne Seberian? Sesinde korku mu duyuyorum?"
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu da ne Seberian? Sesinde korku mu duyuyorum?"

languages.text: "Was ist das, Seberian? Höre ich da etwa Angst in Eurer Stimme?"
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: "Was ist das, Seberian? Höre ich da etwa Angst in Eurer Stimme?"

languages.text: 「これは何だ、シベリア？君の声に恐怖が聞こえるぞ」
languages.original_text: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"

traits.locale_text: 「これは何だ、シベリア？君の声に恐怖が聞こえるぞ」
